name: pando-proxy
description: By pando (https://getpando.ai) under the MIT License. Run Codex through a local OpenAI Responses-compatible memory proxy with one npx command. Maintains a compact task-and-piece memory across rounds, aggressively prunes at end of turn, and exposes an optional local context_get fallback tool for exact retained pieces. Measured replay benchmarks in the repo show the biggest gains on longer multi-round sessions, including a 79.8% average prompt reduction across 345 public SWE-bench Verified trajectories and an 88.2% average reduction on a 20-trace high-round/high-byte public sample. Wraps `codex` transparently: all Codex subcommands and flags (exec, resume, fork, login, mcp, app-server, --sandbox, --model, -c, ...) are passed through unchanged; proxy-specific options are prefixed with --proxy-*.
